attempts.script_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

platform_type BRAWLER_PLATFORM WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER
      aero_file platforms/ACFT_BD.FXW
   end_mover
   processor thinker WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
   processor incoming_threats WSF_THREAT_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type BRAWLER_FLIGHT_LEAD WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER
      aero_file platforms/ACFT_BD.FXW
   end_mover
   processor thinker WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
   processor incoming_threats WSF_THREAT_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
   end_comm
end_platform_type

platform blue_cmdr BRAWLER_FLIGHT_LEAD
   side blue
   route
      position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 3000 m msl speed 150 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform blue_1 BRAWLER_PLATFORM
   side blue
   commander blue_cmdr
   route
      position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 3000 m msl speed 150 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform red_cmdr BRAWLER_FLIGHT_LEAD
   side red
   route
      position 30.92n 104.37e altitude 3000 m msl speed 150 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform red_1 BRAWLER_PLATFORM
   side red
   commander red_cmdr
   route
      position 30.92n 104.37e altitude 3000 m msl speed 150 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/brawler_demo_1v1.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 300 sec
